text:
quadrant (4th to
1st house) into a negative quadrant (first to tenth), then we
have an indication of passing out of the parent and the like.
For instance, an individual lost his father on 1911-11-18,
when he completed seventeen years and twenty-five days. The
arc of direction for this period works to 1 de g. 8' 17'' and his
ascendant is Libra. Exact time is not known. He was said to be
born before seven and after five in the morning. Mercury was
in Scorpio 1 deg. 14'; and this degree rises when the sidreal
time was 9-47-18. We get 8-39-1 when we deduct the arc of
direction from this. This is the sidreal time of his birth. This
works to 6-34 a.m. as the time of birth when Libra 15 deg. 35'
was rising. Assuming this to be correct, if we work out the
directions to 1946, will we get the same results? When he
completed fifty-two years and fourteen days, he lost a son. The
arc will now come to 3 deg. 28' 10". The signifactor is Jupiter
who is in Gemini 13 de g. 58'.
